title: Crispy Fried Cabbage Stir Fry
description: A simple and delicious Asian-inspired dish made with crispy fried cabbage, perfect as a side or add your favorite protein for a complete meal.
instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the grated ginger and minced garlic and stir-fry for 1 minute.
Add the chopped cabbage and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes, until it starts to soften.
Add the soy sauce, sugar, salt, and black pepper, and stir-fry for another 2-3 minutes, until the cabbage is tender but still crisp.
Transfer the cabbage mixture to a serving dish and serve hot.
